calendar.matters:
Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order For Funds Held By Credit Card Processors Due Judgment Debtors
Off Calendar Nov-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
David Cook, Esq. 415-989-4730 Cook Collections Attorneys for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order For Funds Held By Credit Card Processors Due Judgment Debtors.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order For Funds Held By Credit Card Processors Due Judgment Debtors
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Continued To Nov-30-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 585(A)
Off Calendar Sep-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Judgment as to Defendant K&B Remodeling & Sons Inc. and Defendant Haytham Ibrahim, an individual, dba Haytham Ibrahim D.D.S, an individual, dba Mosaic Smile Care.

Dept.505; Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by Tanya Rogers, CSR#10178 elitecourtreporter@gmail.com. (D505)

David Cook, Esq., appearing for and on behalf of Align Technology, Inc by Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Haytham Ibrahim, an individual, dba Haytham Ibrahim D.D.S, an individual, dba Mosaic Smile Care not appearing.
Witness for the Petitioner, Kent Allyne was placed under oath and testified.

Plaintiff's 1st amended complaint for Goods Sold and Delivered filed on March 6, 2023.
Proof of Personal service as to Defendant Haytham Ibrahim, an individual, dba Haytham Ibrahim D.D.S, an individual, dba Mosaic Smile Care upon service in Ontario, Canada filed April 6, 2023.
Order of non-conforming proof of service of process under CCP 417.20 filed June 14, 2023.
